title.en: Another period of time has passed.

content.en:
Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian can be regarded as having initially refined the Relic Stone Tower, and at this moment, he can already control part of the authority of the Relic Stone Tower, but it will take a long time to completely control the Relic Stone Tower.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's immeasurable will penetrated through the eighteenth floor of the ruin stone tower, and the first nine layers had already been seen, so there was nothing to snoop on, but the back nine layers had not been spied on.

Soon, Ye Tian's immeasurable will penetrated the nine layers behind.

"Nine colossal worlds!"

The worlds in the tower are very large, and the personalities of each world are very high, even surpassing the primordial ancient sea, but the area is not comparable.

And he took a preliminary spied and found that the worlds in these nine towers had given birth to a huge amount of resources, and there were even resources that were helpful to him.

These nine worlds alone are priceless treasures, enough to make a top world like Xuanqi Pavilion excited.

Not only that, but some of the resources stored in the Ruined Stone Tower have now also fallen into Ye Tian's hands.

For example, treasures like the Black God Armor Stone, there are dozens of ruin stone towers.

It can be said that after owning the Ruined Stone Tower, Ye Tian's value jumped enough to be comparable to those fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Of course.

Ye Tian also knew very well that his duplicate body would inevitably be targeted by those forces, and once he went out of the ruins stone tower, he would definitely withstand the attacks of many great ancestors.

"Can't go out anytime soon!"

Ye Tian decided.

But he can't never go out, if he doesn't go out all the time, and there is no strong person to guard the ruins stone tower, then he will be determined that he is not a member of a powerful force, or has no background.

Then, there will be a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that will forcibly attack and invade the Ruins Stone Tower.

If they really forcibly broke through the ruin stone tower, Ye Tian's replica body would not be able to hide.

Although forcibly breaking the ruin stone tower would damage the origin of the ruin stone tower, at that time, they didn't care if the ruin stone tower was damaged.

At that time, the ruins stone tower may even be destroyed.

"Let's let those high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the ruins stone tower go out first!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, and those high-level immeasurable lifeforms were all removed by him one by one.

At this time, he was the only one left in the ruins stone tower.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to plan his next practice.

First of all, the immeasurable blood must continue to be condensed and refined, so that you can increase your strength.

In addition, Taihao Immeasurable Body also has to be cultivated, if Taihao Immeasurable Body is promoted to the Dacheng realm, his strength can also be turned upside down.

Then there is the Black God Armor Stone, and he wants to fuse these Black God Armor Stones into the Golden God Armor Stone.

At that time, with the defensive armor formed by the Golden God Armor Stone, it would be difficult for even a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the fourth stage to hit him hard with a single blow.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out the Black God Armor Stones, and then urged the fusion ability of the copy talent.

I saw that these black god armor stones were fused together one by one, and after fusing twelve black god armor stones, the black god armor stones finally began to transform and turned into a golden god armor stone.

Then, Ye Tian refined this Golden God Armor Stone, forming a set of defensive armor that fused with his body, which could protect himself at all times.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to integrate the resources of the Ruins Stone Tower, and collected the resources that were suitable for condensing immeasurable blood, but there were very few or almost no resources that could help refine immeasurable blood to the limit.

For example, the Void Golden Water, which is most suitable for extreme refining immeasurable blood, is not available in the Ruins Stone Tower.

If he didn't have enough Void Golden Water, he wouldn't be able to refine all the immeasurable blood to the limit, and it would be almost impossible to succeed if he relied on himself to slowly refine it.

As for the immeasurable blood on the eighth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower, there is not much left now, and it has been refined by them.

Ye Tian pondered for a while and decided to use part of the resources of the Ruined Stone Tower to trade with some forces in the Xuanqi Realm.

Of course, it was impossible for those forces to trade to give him Void Gold Water.

After all, the Void Golden Water can help the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage to impact the fourth stage, even forces like Xuanqi Pavilion and Jiuyang Sea don't have much Void Golden Water, they will always lack the Void Golden Water.

However, the amount of Void Silver Water was too large, and it was not of much value, and it was almost useless against the top-level third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"The major forces don't have the ability to fuse the Void Silver Water into the Void Gold Water like me, I use some treasures to trade with them, they should be willing. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And with what to trade?

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, and felt that these forces were absolutely willing to use the Black God Armor Stone to trade.

......

Outside the ruins stone tower.

Ye Tian's incarnation appeared, and it immediately attracted the will of a group of high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

When they found out that Ye Tian was just condensing an incarnation, they didn't choose to do it.

Then.

Ye Tian said: "I want to trade some treasures, I don't know which great ancestor is willing to trade?"

Trading treasures?

This immediately attracted some great ancestors, after all, there are really a lot of good things in the ruins stone tower!

So, some Great Ancestors tentatively communicated with Ye Tian and learned that Ye Tian was going to trade the Black God Armor Stone for Void Silver Water, and they were immediately shocked one by one.

In their opinion, Ye Tian should not be short of Void Silver Water, how could he trade it with the Black God Armor Stone?

Even if Ye Tian had a lot of Black God Armor Stones in his hand, he shouldn't trade Void Silver Water, he definitely had to trade Void Gold Water!

And the price given by Ye Tian was a Black God Armor Stone in exchange for 100,000 Void Silver Water, this price was indeed very high, and those third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms naturally couldn't get it.

Ye Tian was actually not trading with these high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but with the top forces in the Xuanqi Realm.

......

Genki Pavilion.

When Xuanxin Great Ancestor got the news, he was immediately a little moved.

A Black God Armor Stone is not of much help to him, at most it adds some defense, but it is of great value to the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

If a high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Star Sea Great Ancestor wears the defensive armor formed by the Black God Armor Stone, it can even be afraid of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor.

Immediately, he called the Xinghai Great Ancestor.

When the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea learned that Xuanqi Pavilion was going to trade a Black God Armor Stone for him, he was immediately extremely excited.

"Thank you Xuanxin Great Ancestor!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said excitedly.

Xuanxin Great Ancestor hurriedly said: "We will trade 100,000 regiments of Void Silver Water for a Black God Armor Stone, but the value of the Void Silver Water paid needs to be slowly repaid by you in the future!"

"I know!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor responded.

Immediately, the Xuanxin Great Ancestor took out 100,000 regiments of Void Silver Water from the Xuanqi Pavilion Treasury and asked the Xinghai Great Ancestor to take it to trade the Black God Armor Stone with Ye Tian.
